_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: Tamoxifen (100 mg/kg body weight) was intraperitoneally administered between P30 and P40 for five consecutive days to induce Cre recombinase activity in CX3CR1+ cells
details: Successfully induced microglia-specific Nf1 deletion when combined with tamoxifen treatment (100 mg/kg for 5 consecutive days between P30-P40)
